data.title: Onchain student loans could supercharge DeFi: Animoca’s Yat Siu
data.description:
Bringing student loans onchain could increase the decentralized finance (DeFi) total value locked (TVL) by more than four times, supercharging the industry, according to Yat Siu, chairman of Animoca Brands. Speaking at Consensus 2025 in Toronto, Siu pointed to the $3 trillion global student loan market as an untapped opportunity for the crypto industry. He said moving even 10% of that market onchain could significantly boost DeFi’s growth. “You basically more than quadruple TVL in all of DeFi,” he said, underscoring how the industry is still in its early stages
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/defi-student-loans-onchain-education-wave?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: SEC Probes Coinbase Over Alleged User Inflation Before IPO
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, May 16, 2025- The Securities and Exchange Commission is reportedly investigating whether Coinbase misled investors by overstating user numbers ahead of its April 2021 public debut, according to a company spokesperson. The inquiry centers on the company’s disclosure of “verified users” in its direct listing registration, a figure that reportedly exceeded 100 million […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/sec-probes-coinbase-over-alleged-user-inflation-before-ipo

data.title: The National Bureau of Statistics released the "Action Plan for Digital China Construction 2025", planning that the added value of core digital economy industries will account for more than 10% of GDP this year.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The General Office of the National Data Administration issued the "2025 Action Plan for the Construction of Digital China", proposing to achieve a number of digital development goals by the end of 2025, including the added value of the core industries of the digital economy accounting for more than 10% of GDP, the computing power scale exceeding 300EFLOPS, and the steady progress of the construction of the data factor market. The plan also emphasizes improving the level of digitalization of government affairs, promoting the construction of digital culture, digital society and digital ecological civilization, and comprehensively enhancing digital security capabilities and improving the digital governance system.

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin may rise to $220,000 by 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto analyst Apsk32 said that Bitcoin following gold to a new high is a popular theory among bullish investors. Historically, Bitcoin usually follows gold's rise a few months after it rises. As the price of gold rises to an all-time high of $3,500 per ounce, the outlook for Bitcoin's future price trend has become brighter. Apsk32 said that the concept of the "power curve" is to circumvent the impact of US dollar inflation by measuring the price of Bitcoin in ounces of gold. If the network value of Bitcoin (in terms of gold) continues to evolve along the power curve, and gold maintains its current price, while the price of Bitcoin returns to the track of leading support for five years, the target of $444,000 may be seen this year. However, this week, Apsk32 believes that a more "reasonable" target price for 2025 may be around $220,000. And said that if the price of Bitcoin breaks through $250,000, it will be beyond the expected range. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: U.S. Officials to Address Trade Agreement Issues Soon, Says Trump
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that American officials will soon be reaching out to various countries regarding trade agreement issues.

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Predicts Single Rate Cut Amid Economic Uncertainty
data.description: According to PANews, Federal Reserve official Bostic has indicated that due to prevailing economic uncertainties, a single interest rate cut is anticipated this year. He forecasts that the U.S. economy may grow at a rate between 1% and 0.5% in 2025. Despite the slowdown in growth, Bostic does not foresee an economic recession occurring.

data.title: MapleStory's transaction volume exceeded 100,000 yesterday, setting a new record
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa’s monitoring, MapleStory (Adventure Island) was launched on the Avalanche subchain Henesys. You need to register a wallet to download the game. The wallet data showed a significant advance on May 14, while the transaction and token data reached a peak yesterday:
· The number of active addresses reached 1.15 million on May 14
· The number of transactions reached 103,000 on May 15
· The number of NESO holding addresses was 3810 on May 15, and the number of NXPC holding addresses was 3080
· Marketplace buyers were 973 and sellers were 2540 on May 15

data.title: Significant Ethereum Transfer Observed by Whale Alert
data.description: According to Foresight News, Whale Alert has detected a substantial movement of Ethereum. A total of 24,496 ETH, valued at approximately $63.82 million, was transferred from an unknown wallet to Ceffu. This transaction highlights ongoing activity in the cryptocurrency market, drawing attention to large-scale transfers and their potential implications.
